feedback.text: Hello, as an active gamer, I share my interest in the Digital Fairness Act. Given the current state of the gaming scene, I would support adding a part that includes the prevention or revocation of already purchased video game(s) / -licenses. They would fit right under the intention of the Digital Fairness Act, as well as the soon-to-be-ending Stop Destroying Games initiative, which has already gathered quite an acknowledgeable size.
